query: Computer, select at random a mystery by Sir Arthur Conan Doyle, where I will play Sherlock Holmes and Lieutenant La Forge will be Doctor John Watson.
Computer, in the Holmesian style, create a mystery to confound Data with an opponent who has the ability to defeat him.

response: If you refer to the arch you ordered, it provides computer control. Do you wish to input any commands?

query: Computer, why wasn't the holodeck programme terminated?
response: The override protocol has been initiated.
Doctor Pulaski is on holodeck two.

query: Computer, tell me, is the programme still running?
